name: Jiangxi Bank Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Bank Co., Ltd. provides corporate and retail banking services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Corporate Banking, Retail Banking and Credit card, and Financial Markets Business segments. It offers time and demand deposits; working capital and fixed asset loans, as well as short-term loans and advances, medium to long term loans, and financial leasing services; and credit and debit cards. The company also provides trade financing and deposit-taking, agency, consulting and advisory, remittance and settlement, and guarantee services; personal loans, bank cards, and personal wealth management services; inter-bank money market transactions; and transaction and investment repurchase services. In addition, it trades in debt securities and government bonds, as well as issues debts; offers money market and asset management services, as well as invests in securities and other financial assets; insurance agency and safe-box services; settles and underwrites government bonds; issues financial bonds; provides bill acceptances and discounting, inter-bank placement, inward and outward payments agency, and foreign exchange services; and offers mobile, online, telephone, and WeChat banking services. The company serves corporations, government agencies and financial institutions, retail customers, and state-owned and private enterprises. The company was formerly known as Bank of Nanchang Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangxi Bank Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Jiangxi Bank Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nanchang, the People's Republic of China.
